allow: PowerShell(Write-Host "=== ROOT DIRECTORY ===" ; Get-ChildItem -Path "c:\\Mendix\\EXT_Development-main\\Extensions\\FavoriteDocs" | Select-Object Name, @{Name="Type"; Expression={if\($_.PSIsContainer\) {"Directory"} else {"File"}}} | Format-Table -AutoSize)

PowerShell(Write-Host "=== SRC DIRECTORY STRUCTURE ===" ; Get-ChildItem -Path "c:\\Mendix\\EXT_Development-main\\Extensions\\FavoriteDocs\\src" -Recurse | Select-Object @{Name="Path"; Expression={$_.FullName.Replace\('c:\\Mendix\\EXT_Development-main\\Extensions\\FavoriteDocs\\', ''\)}} | ForEach-Object { $_.Path } | Sort-Object)
